text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After today's mini concert, Silence<n>Suzuka speaks
with a fan, searching<n>for answers as to how
concerts<n>relate to her running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fan enjoys concerts because<n>they present an
opportunity to sing<n>with her, resonate with her
emotions,<n>and "welcome her home."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While watching a race, fans want<n>nothing more
than to see their<n>favorites back safe with them
again—that's what prompts them to<n>shout
"welcome home!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon hearing this, Suzuka makes up<n>her mind to
listen more closely to the<n>people cheering her on
at her next<n>concert.
